name: Quantum Numbers Corp.
summary: Quantum Numbers Corp. engages in the development of cryptographic solutions based on quantum random number generator in Canada. It develops and markets encrypted communication solutions for the financial/banking, military, mobile, and Internet telecommunication sectors. The company was formerly known as Active Growth Capital Inc. and changed its name to Quantum Numbers Corp. in December 2016. Quantum Numbers Corp. was incorporated in 2007 and is headquartered in Brossard, Canada.
